_instructions: Add your projects. 'demo' is only set when a real hosted demo exists; otherwise only the Code link shows.

projects.title: Spark + Kafka IoT Analytics
projects.description: Real-time IoT data pipeline using Apache Spark Structured Streaming and Kafka to ingest, process, and analyze high-volume sensor streams.
projects.longDescription: Real-time IoT data pipeline using Apache Spark Structured Streaming and Kafka to ingest, process, and analyze high-volume sensor streams.

projects.title: Streamlit + Snowflake Cortex (MCP)
projects.description: Conversational analytics app wiring Snowflake Cortex LLM functions to Streamlit through an MCP server for natural-language data querying.
projects.longDescription: Conversational analytics app wiring Snowflake Cortex LLM functions to Streamlit through an MCP server for natural-language data querying.

projects.title: Comprehensive Healthcare Analytics
projects.description: End-to-end healthcare analytics over claims, provider, and member data — SQL modeling feeding executive Power BI dashboards and KPIs.
projects.longDescription: End-to-end healthcare analytics over claims, provider, and member data — SQL modeling feeding executive Power BI dashboards and KPIs.

projects.title: Customer Trends Analysis
projects.description: Customer behavior and retention analysis in SQL and Python, surfaced through an interactive Power BI dashboard for stakeholders.
projects.longDescription: Customer behavior and retention analysis in SQL and Python, surfaced through an interactive Power BI dashboard for stakeholders.

projects.title: SQL Analytics Portfolio
projects.description: A collection of advanced SQL solutions — CTEs, window functions, and query optimization applied across real business scenarios.
projects.longDescription: A collection of advanced SQL solutions — CTEs, window functions, and query optimization applied across real business scenarios.

projects.title: SQL for Financial Data Analysis
projects.description: Financial analysis in SQL — profitability, cash-flow, and trend queries over banking datasets to answer business questions.
projects.longDescription: Financial analysis in SQL — profitability, cash-flow, and trend queries over banking datasets to answer business questions.

projects.title: Banking Financial Insights
projects.description: Power BI report on banking data delivering loan, deposit, and risk KPIs to support faster stakeholder decisions.
projects.longDescription: Power BI report on banking data delivering loan, deposit, and risk KPIs to support faster stakeholder decisions.

projects.title: FMCG Supply Chain Analysis
projects.description: Supply-chain performance analysis for FMCG retailer AtliqMart, tracking forecast accuracy and fill rates in a Power BI dashboard.
projects.longDescription: Supply-chain performance analysis for FMCG retailer AtliqMart, tracking forecast accuracy and fill rates in a Power BI dashboard.

projects.title: Sales Insights Dashboard
projects.description: Sales performance dashboard built in Tableau on SQL-modeled data, revealing regional and product-level revenue trends.
projects.longDescription: Sales performance dashboard built in Tableau on SQL-modeled data, revealing regional and product-level revenue trends.

projects.title: Power BI: Advanced DAX Dashboards
projects.description: Dynamic Power BI dashboards showcasing advanced DAX — time intelligence, dynamic measures, and drill-through interactions.
